items.docs: Returns a list of all projects belonging to the authenticated user across all organizations.
Creates a new Supabase project within a specified organization. The project will be provisioned with a PostgreSQL database, Auth, Storage, and other services.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific project including its current status, region, database host, and configuration.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a Supabase project and all associated data including the database, storage files, and Edge Functions.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Retrieves the API keys (anon and service_role) for a specific project. These keys are used to authenticate requests to the project's APIs.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Returns the health status of all services in a project including the database, Auth, Storage, Realtime, and Edge Functions.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Pauses a Supabase project to stop incurring compute costs. The project database and services will become unavailable until restored.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Restores a previously paused project, making its database and services available again.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Returns a list of all migrations that have been applied to the project database, stored in the supabase_migrations schema.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Creates and runs a new SQL migration on the project database. The migration is recorded in the supabase_migrations schema.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Edge Functions deployed to a project including their status, slug, and creation date.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Deploys a new Edge Function to the project. The function will be globally distributed and accessible via HTTP requests.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

params.name: function_slug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the Edge Function.

items.docs: Retrieves details about a specific Edge Function including its slug, status, version, and creation date.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

params.name: function_slug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the Edge Function.

items.docs: Updates an existing Edge Function with new code or configuration changes.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

params.name: function_slug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the Edge Function.

items.docs: Permanently removes an Edge Function from the project.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Returns a list of all encrypted secrets stored for a project. Secret values are not returned, only their names.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Creates one or more encrypted secrets for the project. These secrets are available to Edge Functions as environment variables.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Deletes one or more secrets from the project by their names.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Retrieves the custom hostname configuration for a project including its current status and verification records.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Activates a custom hostname for the project. The custom domain must have DNS records properly configured before activation.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Removes the custom hostname configuration from a project, reverting to the default supabase.co subdomain.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Retrieves the vanity subdomain configuration for a project.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Activates a vanity subdomain on supabase.co for the project. Use of vanity subdomains and custom domains is mutually exclusive.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Removes the vanity subdomain from a project.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Returns a list of IP addresses that are currently banned from accessing the project due to abusive traffic patterns such as multiple failed authentication attempts.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Removes specified IP addresses from the project's network ban list, allowing them to access the project again.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Retrieves the network restriction configuration for a project, which controls which IP addresses or CIDR ranges are allowed to connect to the database.

params.name: ref
params.description: The unique reference ID for the project, found in the project settings or URL.

items.docs: Updates the allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges that can connect to the project database.
Returns a list of all organizations the authenticated user belongs to.
Creates a new organization that can contain Supabase projects and team members.

params.name: slug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug identifier for the organization.

items.docs: Returns a list of all members in an organization along with their roles and permissions.
